_doc: S2.2 reviewed source publication-date corrections (docs/step-2-implementation-plan.md §S2.2). Consulted at materialize time by source-date-backfill.ts at highest precedence. This is the sanctioned residue-resolution channel: add a reviewed date here rather than loosening normalizeDateText. Only `overrides` is read by code.

14th_street_busway.note: 14th St busway opened Oct 2019; corroborated by sibling source 14th_street_busway_brochure (staged documentDate 2019-10). Held to year precision — the page also references June 2020 monitoring.

pending_review._comment: source_undated residue after S2.2 deterministic (metadata documentDate + filename) + corroborated passes. These are evergreen/live/dataset-documentation pages with no single publication date — promoting any to `overrides` with a reviewed date is an owner call; otherwise they remain a legitimate source_undated gap (S2.8).
